activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

llm_result.activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

ground_truth_steps.description: Ask the patient for their surname (last name)

response_steps.description: Refer to the patient's official identification document for the surname.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps aim to obtain the patient's surname, but the ground truth asks the patient verbally while the response refers to an official ID document.

ground_truth_steps.description: Confirm the spelling of the surname with the patient

response_steps.description: Verify the surname matches the ID exactly and save the record.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps involve verification of the surname, but the ground truth confirms spelling with the patient, while the response verifies against the ID document.

ground_truth_steps.description: Enter the surname into the registration system

response_steps.description: Enter the surname into the surname field in the HIS.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe entering the surname into a system (registration system vs. HIS).
